name: Stella & Chewy's Marie’s Magical Dinner Dust Cage Free Chicken Recipe Freeze-Dried Raw Cat Food Topper, 7-oz bag
description: Make mealtime extra exciting, especially for picky palates with Stella & Chewy’s Marie’s Magical Dinner Dust! This scrumptious cage-free chicken freeze-dried topper allows you to add a sprinkle of raw nutrition to your furry friend’s meal. Adding raw to your paw-tner’s diet can help promote healthy digestion, improve appetite and help relieve symptoms from allergies and more! This topper is made in the USA with 95% meat, organ and bones, along with real fruits and veggies. And you can have peace of mind knowing that it’s made without any grains, gluten, or binders.
